message:
fix(home): remove unused cn import and update flywheel tool count to 15

Drop the unused cn utility import from @/lib/utils. Bump the Flywheel
snapshot card from "10 more tools" to "11 more tools" to reflect the
current ecosystem total of 15 tools.
